title: Deep Origins GUI overhaul
description: New modern GUI in vanilla style
body:
![Deep Origins GUI Overhaul](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/980695/description_427382cd-65e3-4cf6-adc8-6c16624f5bc0.png)                 [![Available on CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07f3f0763217426e35845bb22e0d72974cbb75be.png)][CurseForge][![Available on GitHub](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/225946f8918e13cd79a118c660daca4bc0bce51b.png)][GitHub][![Join my Discord Server !](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76439ca509e8b0166adfcab1331cbce147911914.png)][Discord]   ![About this pack](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/980695/description_73ceb961-414a-46d8-9bfd-e3bc3f9b2d72.png) ![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21af3b840cfe23195b53d370f2e44ad24f2bcfb4.png) **Deep Origins - GUI overhaul** is a Minecraft Java resource pack which redesigns the game's graphical user interface while keeping the deep origins of the Vanilla style. **This pack doesn't require OptiFine.** Instead, it uses Vanilla core shaders to changes the GUI's appearance.
# ![Features](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/980695/description_eea46360-4286-4a64-a860-d4fcf43665c7.png) ## "Enchanted menus" - New options background ![Menus - Enchanted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ded2c0cdc7802dc59574309e3f79a04da0268220.png) **"Menus - Enchanted"** is a resource pack created by **DartCat25** ([Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/dartcat25/ "Go to DartCat25's profile page")) which changes the boring default dirt background by a procedurally generated one which mimics Minecraft's ore generation. It is achieved by modifying core shaders, meaning it doesn't require any mod to function.
Additional info * Fixed compatibility with 1.20 and fixed some rendering issues in mod settings or menus. However, this pack is no longer compatible with Background Transitions. * Tabs are retextured to match the new options background.

## Redesigned containers ![Redesigned containers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e70f7e29dae863f185b968fc13790503f4659b5.png) **The anvil, beacon, blast furnace, brewing stand, cartography table, crafting table, dispenser, dropper, enchanting table, furnace, grindstone, hopper, horse, loom, shulker box, smithing table, smoker and stonecutter GUI were redesigned to match the blocks themselves**. They are now more consistent and pleasant to use. **_Brewing stand GUI heavily inspired from Advanced GUI by Blasjel (PMC)_** **Villager XP bars** now **match with the player's XP bar.** The **recipe book** was also redesigned to **look more like a book**, rather than a simple panel. The **recipe book icon** was changed to match the **knowledge book's texture**. **Another**, darker, **recipe book is also available** as an addon. Click [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alt-recipe-book) to access it.
## Consistent button highlights ![Consistent button highlights](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc1f59a0618b6e30f1c3bfbeb3b65b6d7b38dd73.png) **Changes the blue-highlighted textures of all buttons** to a **white outline**, to match them with the main menu widgets. The **recipe book button** is now **rectangular** and **no longer has a black outline**.  **_Thanks to vanillatweaks.net for the resource pack, server and world selection button textures._**
## Updated icons ![Updated toast icon](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/980695/description_3cc77b02-1f89-4ada-80bf-6e8aa068b0f3.png) **Toast, stats and spectator mode icons** now match 1.14+ textures. _**Thanks to vanillatweaks.net for those icons.**_ **Checkmark** and **cross icons** were **changed** to look the same everywhere. **Changed language setting icon** to make it more consistent and modern. **Updated realms icons** to match them with the rest. **Colorful unknown server icon** and **ping indicator**. _**Thanks to vanillatweaks.net for the colored ping indicator.**_ ## New empty slot icons **Changed "Delete Item"** creative inventory **icon** to a **trash can** _(from TrashSlot mod)_ **Changed armor slot icons** to match with the armor pieces themselves and **removed left hand slot icon**. **Changed emerald slot icon** (smithing table) to make it look better. ![Creative inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e85f13ff727f2cc780beea0b2c1bb33defb77cdc.png)
## Semi-translucent GUI parts Made **some HUD parts** (such as the XP bar) **semi-translucent**. The **background of the hotbar** was also **changed**. **Potion effect icons** are now **semi-translucent** to make them less obstructive. ![Semi-translucent GUI parts](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/980695/description_bd6229d8-1fe0-4ef9-a2d3-2606dd219cf9.png)
## More text shadows **_![Action bar text with shadows](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/980695/description_a76b326c-346e-45fa-a257-168436cce14b.png)_** **Adds text shadows to the F3 debug screen, action bar text and in some GUI elements** to make them more readable. Gray and black text have no shadows so you can still read them easily. **_Thanks to DartCat25 for some help in the code._** # ![Gallery](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/980695/description_9d686823-2dd7-4272-bdab-2536706d87a8.png) [![Gallery images](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eda44578bda98a0dfe2f88f55879f43f6f6504c.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/deep-origins-gui-overhaul/gallery)   # ![Credits](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/980695/description_d5f5710b-93b6-4d7f-8249-63e9abed88fe.png) ### Thanks to: * **DartCat25** ([Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/dartcat25/ "Go to DartCat25's profile page")) for some help in the shaders code. * **[vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net "Go to the Vanilla Tweaks site")** for updated toast, stats, spectator textures and colored ping indicators. # ![Also see](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/980695/description_f51b0cb6-9ed1-4939-bda0-18e2611c16c9.png) [![Deep Origins GUI Overhaul - Alternate recipe book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55268d952f0f380bc6ce9dc6dc063b490fa67bb6.png)](https://www.modrinth.com/resourcepack/alt-recipe-book) [![Deep Origins Overlays](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc94f5571767332df3d61615a35b7d2b8142b7c8.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/deep-origins-overlays)
# ![Changelog](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/980695/description_f30ecc81-87fe-483e-99e3-12a3e6a3018f.png) ### Beta releases :
Deep Origins Overlays GUI Overhaul Beta v1.1b * Redesigned anvil, beacon, blast furnace, brewing stand, cartography table, crafting table, dispenser, dropper, enchanting table, furnace, grindstone, hopper, horse, loom, shulker box, smithing table, smoker and stonecutter GUI.
Deep Origins Overlays GUI Overhaul Beta v1.0b * Original beta release * Available from 1.20 to 1.20.4
